title: Keyboard
description: Displays keyboard keys and shortcuts. Use ax-kbd as a container and ax-kbd-item to render single keys or combinations.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-kbd with basic key combinations.

sections.title: Single Keys
sections.description: Display individual keys using string values for the keys input.

sections.title: Key Combinations
sections.description: Show common keyboard shortcuts using arrays for the keys input.

sections.title: Modifier Keys
sections.description: Demonstrate various modifier key combinations including Alt, Meta, and complex shortcuts.

props.name: nativeElement
props.description: Inherited from NXComponent. Gets the native DOM element associated with this component.

props.name: keys
props.description: Keys to display. Accepts a single key or an ordered list for combinations (e.g., ['Ctrl','A']).

props.name: modifierKeys
props.description: List of modifier keys that are handled specially in key combinations. Defaults to ['ctrl', 'shift', 'alt', 'meta', 'esc'].

props.name: nativeElement
props.description: Inherited from NXComponent. Gets the native DOM element associated with this component.
